title: Principal Frontend Developer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
